title: Holiday greetings
content:
Desmond: Happy Friday everyone! Enjoy the long weekend.
Alice Chen: You too! Any fun plans?
Desmond: Just grilling and relaxing.

title: Deploy: microbots v0.2 to staging

title: Week 2: microbots SurrealDB progress
content:
Desmond: Pushed schema updates for week 2. HNSW indexes are looking good.
Bob Kim: Nice! Did you verify the embedding DIMENSION matches?
Desmond: Yes, 1536 — matches the OpenAI embeddings. All green.

title: PR review request: week 1 changes
content:
Desmond: @bob PR #5 is ready for review — microbots enrichment layer.
Bob Kim: On it. Will review today.

title: Deploy cadence update (week 4)
content:
Desmond: Actually, we're switching deploys to Thursdays starting next sprint. Tuesday is too tight after standup.
Alice Chen: Fine by me. I'll update the runbook.
Bob Kim: Thursday it is. Less context-switching.

title: Deploy pipeline shipped
content:
Desmond: Deploy pipeline (MIC-99, PR #99) is live. Notion runbook updated.
